objective: Gateway and broker discover each other via iroh mdns + seed list. Mutual peer.connected spans appear in Jaeger. Disconnect detection emits peer.disconnected.
in_scope: Wire iroh MdnsDiscovery (discovery-local-network feature) into Endpoint::builder — passive LAN peer discovery without RAFKA_SEED_NODES
RAFKA_SEED_NODES env var: <node_id>@<host>:<port> comma-separated, dials on boot
rafka.mesh.peer.disconnected{node_id, peer_id, reason} via Connection::closed() on both inbound + outbound connections
out_of_scope: Sending payload data between peers — Sprint 04
exit_criteria: Run gateway + broker concurrently with RAFKA_SEED_NODES — both emit peer.discovered + peer.connected DONE
Run without RAFKA_SEED_NODES — mdns auto-discovery triggers peer.connected within ~5s DONE
Kill one process — surviving process emits peer.disconnected DONE
Both direction=inbound and direction=outbound peer.connected spans verified in Jaeger DONE
